description_long: This object is a circular spice rack with a modern, minimalist design, featuring three evenly spaced horizontal shelves supported by a round frame. The frame and shelves appear to be made of metal with a warm, bronze-like finish, giving it a sleek and contemporary look. The open design allows for easy access to spices from the front, while the back is fully open, maximizing visibility and accessibility. The sides are solid, forming the circular boundary, and the shelves are tubular, likely designed to hold spice containers securely in place. There are no visible containers or labels present on the rack. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and intended for display or easy reach in a kitchen or urban living space.
description: A circular, bronze-colored metal spice rack with three horizontal shelves and an open, modern design. The rack is sturdy and visually striking, ideal for kitchen display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular frame and three horizontal shelves, with open access to the shelves.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thickness of the circular frame and the depth of the shelves, with no interior details visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, identical to the front, showing the open circular frame and three shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the frame's thickness and shelf depth.
